'''Redge Dunlak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as a Podracing official during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted for tampering with Hutt-owned pods prior to last year's Boonta Eve Podrace. He was captured by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty on his head.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Redge Dunlak' bounty is 2,400 credits alive and 1,200 credits dead. When the player highlights [[Redge Dunlak]] with the ID Scanner Boonta Eve is mistakenly spelt "Boont's Eve"

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
